untranslatable_reason: The signal requires identification of an EADT pattern (Early Analysis Downtrend Target) and detection of a downward breakout. Pattern recognition and breakout detection are not available in the allowed indicators list. The source excerpt is incomplete and does not provide quantifiable thresholds for pattern confirmation or breakout magnitude.
translation_notes: Entry condition uses ADX > 25 as a proxy for strong downtrend confirmation in bear market context. Exit at 35 days (hold_days_max) with additional exit if returns exceed +2% (price typically rises after day 35). The core pattern identification logic cannot be translated without custom pattern detection capabilities.
